history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a grimacing white skull graphic above large bold text and a small yellow icon on a dark background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a stylized white skull with dark eye sockets and a shadowy, smoky halo-like background behind it. In the foreground, large white block lettering reads “DUH GUSTI,” with a small yellow circular icon on the right that contains a teal and dark shape.

Setting:
The background appears dark and undefined, with a reddish-brown area behind the skull, suggesting a graphic or poster-like design rather than a real-world scene. The lighting is flat and high-contrast, consistent with a digital image.

Visual Details:
The skull is centered near the top, rendered in pale white with dark interior features. The lower text is in thick, uppercase, white letters with a black outline or shadow for contrast. The overall palette is dark (black/gray) with reddish-brown behind the skull, and bright white text contrasting strongly. The image is pixelated or compressed, making edges look blocky. The composition is tightly cropped, with the skull occupying the upper half and the text occupying the lower half.

Visible Text:
DUH GUSTI

Practical Summary:
The image is a graphic-style composition featuring a white skull above the text “DUH GUSTI.” It also includes a small yellow circular icon to the right of the text on a dark background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
